title: USDA releases Census of Agriculture data for the Commonwealth of Northern Mariana Islands
summary: The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) released the 2023 Census of Agriculture data for the Commonwealth of Northern Mariana Islands (CNMI) today.
